Class DifferentialSave

Namespace
ProjetEasySave.Model
Assembly
EasySaveWPF.dll

Represents the differential backup strategy implementation of the ISaveStrategy interface.

public class DifferentialSave : ISaveStrategy
Inheritance
object
DifferentialSave
Implements
ISaveStrategy
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Remarks

This strategy compares the source directory against a previously completed full backup. It only copies files that are new or have been modified since that full backup. It handles large files, encryption, and pauses when restricted business software is running.

Constructors

DifferentialSave(SaveTask, SemaphoreSlim, string)

Initializes a new instance of the DifferentialSave class.

public DifferentialSave(SaveTask saveTask, SemaphoreSlim bigFileSemaphore, string fullBackupPath)

Parameters

saveTask SaveTask

The main task object associated with this backup operation.

bigFileSemaphore SemaphoreSlim

The semaphore used to limit concurrent transfers of large files across the application.

fullBackupPath string

The reference path to the last complete backup used for comparison.

Methods

doSave(string, string, List<string>, CancellationToken, ManualResetEventSlim, Action<int, string>)

Executes the differential backup process. Compares the source with the full backup, isolates modified or new files, and copies them to the destination.

public bool doSave(string sourcePath, string destinationPath, List<string> priorityExt, CancellationToken token, ManualResetEventSlim pauseEvent, Action<int, string> progress)

Parameters

sourcePath string

The path of the directory to be backed up.

destinationPath string

The path where the differential backup will be stored.

priorityExt List<string>

A list of extensions dictating which files should be processed first.

token CancellationToken

A cancellation token to handle stop requests mid-process.

pauseEvent ManualResetEventSlim

A manual reset event to handle pause and resume functionalities.

progress Action<int, string>

An action delegate used to push progress percentage updates and filenames to the UI thread.

Returns

bool

true if the save process successfully completed; otherwise, false.

Exceptions

OperationCanceledException

Thrown when the backup process is explicitly cancelled by the user.

getCompleteSavePath()

Retrieves the reference path of the complete backup used by this differential strategy.

public string getCompleteSavePath()

Returns

string

A string representing the path to the full backup directory.

getState()

Retrieves the current execution state of the backup task.

public SaveTaskState getState()

Returns

SaveTaskState

The current SaveTaskState.

isBusinessSoftwareRunning()

Checks whether the configured business software is currently actively running on the system.

public bool isBusinessSoftwareRunning()

Returns

bool

true if the business software is running; otherwise, false.

setState(SaveTaskState)

Updates the execution state of the backup task and triggers the notification event in the main task.

public SaveTaskState setState(SaveTaskState state)

Parameters

state SaveTaskState

The new SaveTaskState to apply.

Returns

SaveTaskState

The updated state.

waitForBusinessSoftwareToClose()

Suspends the backup thread and waits until all instances of the conflicting business software are closed. Logs a waiting message to the real-time tracker.

public void waitForBusinessSoftwareToClose()
